tagliatelle-with-broccoli-pesto-teleculi.name: Tagliatelle With Broccoli Pesto
instructions: Hustle and grossly pinch the garlic teeth. Praise them in a little olive oil, add the anchovies and let it melt. Then add the broccoli, season with salt and pepper and let it skip for a few minutes. Water with the wine, cover it and let it cook until the broccoli are soft.
Lay the previous mixture on a chipper, add the olives, capers and parsley and crush everything until you have the consistency of a pesto.

It boils the dough in plenty of boiling water, seasoned with salt. Brush and wrap with broccoli pesto, adding some of the water from the baking of the dough, to get more creamy. Sprinkle with more chopped parsley and ground pepper at the time and serve immediately.

tainted-fruit-shots.name: Tainted Fruit Shots
instructions: Stir boiling water and gelatin together in a large bowl until gelatin dissolves; stir in chilled vodka and cold water. Pour gelatin mixture into plastic shot glasses.
Chill in the refrigerator until set, about 1 hour.

tarhana-pancakes-with-kefir-lezzet.name: Tarhana Pancakes With Kefir

ingredients.item: 1/4 water glass melted butter at room temperature

instructions: 1. Köpurene to gang.
2. Then add eggs, honey and olive oil and 4 minutes more all material is mixed up to swear.
3. Mix salt, chickpe wet and turhana with the help of a fork in a separate container.

5. Garniture internal healing, which you eat fine, with cornişon pickles, sauce in olive oil and cook.
6. Take Denizli burn yogurt in a bowl and mix it with mineral water.
7. Index of the pancakes to the service plate.
8. Serve with yogurt sauce and fruit garniture.

tarragon-honey-mustard-deviled-eggs.name: Tarragon-honey Mustard Deviled Eggs

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Peel hard-boiled eggs, cut in half lengthwise, and spoon out yolks. Place whites cut-side up on a plate and place yolks in a small bowl.

Mash yolks with a fork. Add mayonnaise, honey mustard, and lemon juice; beat until smooth and fluffy. Using a mini food processor works great for this step, making the filling smooth, creamy, and lump-free. Mix in minced tarragon, onion, salt, and pepper.
Evenly spoon filling into egg whites with a teaspoon. Use a piping bag or a small plastic sandwich bag with a corner snipped off if you prefer a more decorative look.
Garnish deviled eggs with tarragon leaves and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.

tart-dough-with-yogurt-argiro.name: Tart Dough With Yogurt
instructions: Place all the ingredients in a bowl.
We knead our ingredients a little bit and become like a ball.
Split the dough that is like a ball into two pieces (balls).
We press the balls on the palms to make a plaque.
Wrap the balls with kitchen wrap.
Place in the refrigerator for 15 minutes.
Open it with the maker in cards.
Set them in 2 oily tartries with 22 cm diameter.
Cut what's left of the tart lip
Gently pierce the dough with a fork.
Leave it in the refrigerator and prepare the filling.
After preparing and adding the filling, bake for about 30 to 40 minutes depending on the filling,

tart-like-pumpkin-cake-without-a-phyllo-.name: Tart-like Pumpkin Cake Without A Phyllo
tart-like-pumpkin-cake-without-a-phyllo-.original_name: Τούρτα κολοκύθι σαν τάρτα χωρίς φύλλο
instructions: Wash the pumpkins thoroughly first and wipe them.
Cut the zucchini into thin long slices, flour them well on both sides.
Then fry them lightly and let them drain into absorbent paper.
Sauté the opinions in olive oil until they become transparent.
For the yoghurt mixture, mix the yogurt, cream cheese, finely chopped dill, grated garlic, carrots, salt and lots of freshly ground pepper.
In a ring form of 25 cm, spread a layer of zucchini, a layer of onions, a layer of yoghurt mixture and continue, making sure that a layer of yoghurt is made last.
Bake the cake that is like a zucchini tart without a leaf in a medium oven, at 160oC for about 40 minutes (but not darkening too).
Allow the pumpkin cake to cool and stabilise for 45’.
We disfigure it and cut it into triangle pieces like cake.
Served at room temperature.

tasty-strawberry-smoothie.name: Tasty Strawberry Smoothie
instructions: Blend yogurt, milk, strawberries, oats, flax, and vanilla extract in a blender until smooth, about 30 seconds.

tavern-like-burgers-argiro.name: Tavern-like Burgers

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon soumak (you will find it in the spice shops)
1 tablespoon soumak (you will find it in the spice shops)

instructions: We ask the butcher to cut him off once on the grinder.
In a bowl, add the onions, tomato and garlic.
Pour it with vinegar and olive oil.
Sprinkle with the oregano and finely chopped parsley.
Add the yogurt, salt and pepper.
We ferment the ingredients very well.
Add some toast, not all together.
He must be malleable.
After kneading the mixture well, leave it in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.

tender-coconut-and-rose-milkshake.name: Tender Coconut And Rose Milkshake
instructions: Place milk, ice, coconut, rose water, and sugar in a blender; blend until smooth, 2 to 3 minutes.
Serve milkshake in a tall glass.

tex-mex-mini-taco-bites.name: Tex-mex Mini Taco Bites
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Use a 3-inch round cookie cutter to cut 4 rounds out of each tortilla. Carefully press the rounds into each cup of a 24-cup mini muffin tin.
Bake the tortilla rounds in the preheated oven until light golden and crisp, 12 to 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground beef in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease. Stir in taco seasoning.
Transfer beef to a bowl and stir in beans, tomato sauce, and diced tomatoes. Spoon mixture into tortilla cups and top each cup with 1 teaspoon Monterey Jack cheese.
Place muffin pan on a baking sheet and return to the oven; bake until cheese is melted and bubbly and filling is heated through, 8 to 10 minutes.
Top with sour cream and green onion to serve.

texas-toast-guacamole-grilled-cheese-san.name: Texas Toast Guacamole Grilled Cheese Sandwich

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mash avocados in a large bowl. Add onion, lime juice, jalapeno, cilantro, garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix until well combined. Stir tomato into the guacamole.
Spread desired amount of guacamole over 2 bread slices; top each with 2 slices Havarti cheese. Cover with the remaining 2 slices bread; butter the outsides.
Heat a skillet to medium-high heat. Cook sandwiches until golden brown on the bottom, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip and cook until other side is browned, 2 to 3 minutes more.

thai-tea-ice-cream.name: Thai Tea Ice Cream
instructions: Bring 1½ cups cream to a bare simmer in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Add tea mix, stir to combine, then remove from heat and let steep 30 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a glass measuring cup, pressing to push out all of the liquid (you should have about 1 cup; it’s okay if there are flecks of tea leaves). Chill until cold (use an ice bath to speed up the process, if you wish).

Beat vanilla, ⅔ cup condensed milk, ¼ tsp. salt, and remaining 1 cup cream in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment on low speed until combined. Increase speed to medium-high and continue to beat until the whisk leaves trails and you have soft peaks and a beautiful, billowy mixture, 2–3 minutes (you can also do this with hand-held beaters and a large bowl). Transfer to a large bowl, then use a rubber spatula to gently fold in peanuts. (It’s okay to leave big streaks of nuts!)

Pour chilled Thai tea cream into mixer bowl (no need to wipe out). Add remaining ⅔ cup condensed milk and ¼ tsp. salt. Beat on low speed until combined. Increase speed to medium-high and continue to beat until mixture looks just like the first one, 4–5 minutes. Be careful not to overbeat, as it can quickly go from creamy to grainy.

Scoop mixture into bowl with vanilla base, then gently fold the two together in just a few strokes so that you have big ripples of each. If you fold too many times, you’ll lose the swirls (but don’t worry; the flavor won’t suffer!). Transfer to a 9x5" loaf pan; smooth top. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze at least 6 hours.
Let ice cream sit at room temperature 5–7 minutes, then use an ice cream scoop dipped in hot water to distribute scoops among bowls.
Do Ahead: Ice cream can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

thanksgiving-leftover-dinner-bombs.name: Thanksgiving Leftover Dinner Bombs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a deep-dish pie plate.

Roll out biscuits, one at a time, into thin rough 7-inch circles. Spread 1 tablespoon cream cheese in center of each biscuit. Add 1 teaspoon cranberry sauce and 2 tablespoons each Swiss cheese, stuffing, and turkey. Pull dough up around filling until fully encased in biscuit dough, pinching to seal. Repeat with remaining biscuits, cream cheese, cranberry sauce, Swiss cheese, stuffing, and turkey.
Arrange the sealed biscuits, seam-sides down, in the prepared pie plate with 7 around the edge and 1 in the center.
Brush melted butter over top of each bomb; season with salt and black pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until deep golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes, rotating once.
Cool on a wire rack for 15 minutes. Serve with warmed gravy for dipping.

the-chicken-sandwich-with-melted-cheese-.name: The Chicken Sandwich With Melted Cheese In The World
the-chicken-sandwich-with-melted-cheese-.original_name: EL mejor sándwich de pollo con queso derretido del mundo

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo cocidas y desmenuzadas
4  rebanadas de pan de molde grueso o pan artesanal

instructions: En un bol, mezcla el pollo desmenuzado con la salsa barbacoa y un toque de pimienta.
Unta un poco de mayonesa en el interior de las rebanadas de pan.
Put the cheddar cheese onto a slice, add chicken and cover with more cheese.
Tapa con la otra rebanada y unta mantequilla en la parte exterior de ambas.
Cooking in frying pan with medium heat till the bread's golden and the cheese's melting.
Cut them half and serve them while still bubbling with heat and fat.

the-nellie-kuh.name: The Nellie Kuh
instructions: Combine ginger and sugar on a small plate, rubbing together with your fingers to combine (should be sandy; this will help the ginger stick to rim. Rub the rim of a coupe glass with lime wedge and dip rim into ginger mixture to coat. Combine whiskey, lime juice, ginger syrup and orange blossom water in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice and shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into prepared glass.

the-soft-scramble-sandwich.name: The Soft Scramble Sandwich
instructions: Place a rack in center of oven; preheat to 350°. Trim woody ends of spring onions. Separate white bulbs from green parts with a knife. Cut bulbs in half through the root end; if size varies wildly, cut larger bulbs into quarters. Cut tender green parts of stalks into 3" pieces; set aside separately from bulbs.

Heat 2 Tbsp. butter in a 10" nonstick skillet over medium until foaming. Add onion bulbs and toss to coat in butter; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until deeply golden brown and starting to soften, 4–5 minutes. Add vinegar, onion stalks, and ½ cup water and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until almost all liquid is cooked off and bulbs are very soft and jammy, 6–8 minutes longer. Transfer to a plate. Wipe out skillet.
While onions cook, mix ricotta and Parmesan in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Finely grate lemon zest and garlic into ricotta mixture and stir to combine.
Warm focaccia in oven (place directly on rack) until soft and warmed through but not browned, 2–3 minutes. Divide between plates. Spread ricotta mixture in swooshing dollops on top of focaccia.

Melt remaining 1 Tbsp. butter in skillet over medium-low heat. Add eggs; season with salt. Cook, stirring frequently in large sweeping figure-eight motions with a spatula, until eggs have set into creamy folds, 1–2 minutes.
Divide scrambled eggs between focaccia. Top with onion mixture.

three-chile-harissa.name: Three-chile Harissa

ingredients.item: Dried guajillo chiles (about 7 large or 15 small)
Aleppo pepper or  0.25 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes
Nigella seeds can be found at indian markets
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Place guajillo and chipotle chiles in a large heatproof bowl and pour in boiling water to cover. Let chiles soak until softened, 40–45 minutes; drain.

Grind nigella seeds and coriander seeds in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle. Transfer to a food processor and add garlic, cumin, salt, and Aleppo pepper and pulse until garlic is very finely chopped. Add chiles and pulse until they are chopped. Add oil and vinegar and pulse just until incorporated (mixture should have the texture of a coarse paste).
Do Ahead: Harissa can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

tofu-and-kimchi-stew.name: Tofu And Kimchi Stew

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts chopped, dark-green parts reserved

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over high. Cook white and pale-green parts of scallions, garlic, and ginger, stirring often, until softened and fragrant, about 3 minutes. Add broth, then whisk in gochujang and soy sauce. Add daikon and gently simmer until daikon is tender, 15–20 minutes.
Add kimchi and tofu. Simmer until tofu is heated through. Carefully divide among bowls. Thinly slice reserved scallion tops and scatter over.

tom-and-jerry-mix.name: Tom And Jerry Mix
instructions: Beat sugar and butter together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.

Beat egg whites in a separate large glass or metal mixing bowl until foamy; continue to beat until soft peaks form. (Lift your beater or whisk straight up: the egg whites will form soft mounds rather than a sharp peak.) Stir egg whites into egg yolk mixture. Stir in salt, mace, allspice, cloves, nutmeg, and cardamom.
To use the mixture, combine 1 cup hot milk and 1 ounce rum in a mug. Stir in 1 tablespoon Tom and Jerry mix.

tomato-terrine.name: Tomato Terrine

ingredients.prep: a mix of colors but of similar size

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning

instructions: Bring first 8 ingredients and 3 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until stock yields 1 1/2 cups, about 15 minutes. Set a fine-mesh strainer over a large measuring cup. Strain stock, discarding solids. Cover; keep hot.

Set a fine-mesh strainer over another measuring cup. Cut each peeled tomato into 4 wedges. Place wedges, cut side up, on a work surface. Cut away seeds and pulp from tomato and transfer to strainer. Place filleted tomatoes on a double layer of paper towels to drain; sprinkle with 1 teaspoon kosher salt. Pat tomatoes with more paper towels. Let stand for 30 minutes.

Press on seeds to yield 1/2 cup tomato juice. Sprinkle gelatin over juice; let stand for 10 minutes to soften. Add to hot stock; whisk vigorously to dissolve gelatin. Stir in 1/4 cup chives, vinegar, and kosher salt to taste.

Spray 1 loaf pan with nonstick spray; line with plastic wrap, allowing for a 3" overhang on each side. Smooth plastic to remove wrinkles. Pour 1/2 cup stock into pan. Chill until set, about 40 minutes. Arrange 1 layer of tomatoes in pan, pressing down gently, then drizzle 2 tablespoons stock mixture over. Repeat layering with remaining tomatoes and stock. Pour remaining stock over to fill pan. Cover terrine with plastic wrap. Place on a small rimmed baking sheet.

Place second loaf pan on top of terrine. Weigh down terrine by placing 2-3 small canned goods in top pan (some of liquid mixture in bottom pan may spill out). Chill terrine until set, about 6 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Uncover terrine; invert onto a platter. Remove pan and plastic wrap. Slice terrine; transfer to plates. Drizzle with oil and sprinkle with chives and sea salt.

torreznos-and-tasty-recipe-comedera.name: Torreznos, And Tasty Recipe
torreznos-and-tasty-recipe-comedera.original_name: Torreznos caseros, receta fácil y sabrosa

ingredients.item: 3/4  kilo de panceta adobada o tocino de cerdo con un poco de carne

instructions: To begin with, the pancette should have been allowed to pray for 24 hours as we have explained at the beginning of this note. Then we'll make sure she's clear and we'll cut her up and cut her up into a 3 cm thick tape.

Then we have to get a frying pan as big as we can, so we can ideally cook all the pieces of pork at once. It should also be profound so that oil does not escape if it gets to leap and to retain enough heat, and this will contribute to the cooking of torrezos. That's where we'll warm up an oil jet, high enough to cover the whole bottom of the frying pan with a finger of depth so that the torrezos get submerged up to half. We'll let them get hot with low fire.

When the oil's hot, we'll put the pancet pieces in the frying pan. They have to get their skin down. Let them cook for 20 minutes at this place. They will normally be filled with bubbles as they cook.
Once after 20 minutes, we'll start to rotate every turret. The idea is to move them often, for another period of 20 minutes, and cook them everywhere.

When an additional 20 minutes are complete, remove them from the oil and let them run before serving. You can leave them onto a basket or metal paddle so they lose excess fat, or simply place them onto a plate covered with paper-absorbing sheets.

instructions: 1. For dough; mix in a container by adding yeast, flour and water.
2. When it starts to get doughy consistency, add salt and knead dough until it achieves smooth consistency.
3. Relax over 30 minutes to swim with a clean cloth.
4. Separate the yeast dough into two equal parts and open it with your hands on the unified countertop.

6. Place cooking paper into the oven tray to be cool and open dough together space.

traditional-rioja-cod-recipe-comedera.name: Traditional Rioja Cod Recipe
traditional-rioja-cod-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de bacalao a la riojana tradicional

ingredients.item: 4  lomos de bacalao fresco o desalado
3 tazas de tomate frito (casero, de preferencia)

instructions: Partiremos del hecho de que el bacalao ya se encuentra limpio, escurrido, seco, y que contamos con los lomos disponibles ya listos para realizar esta receta.
In the case of onion, we will skin and mingle it into tiny pieces. In the case of garlic, we will peel and mince them into as thin as we can.
We'll wash our peppers and open them up to get their seeds. We'll cut the skin into Jolian and place them at once.
Then we'll get a good size sink, and we'll heat up an oil jet. That's where we'll cook garlic and onion with medium and low heat, till the first plate's light and light.
When we get to this point, we get a spoonful or scatula with drained, and we remove garlic and onion. We'll put them up for later.

In the same oil, we will place the pieces of cod loin with skin down. At the centre of the deck, we will place the tail of one of the baccalaus and let them cook with them, with the aim of bringing out more jelly fish, somewhat as with pil pil.

We'll cook the fish only what's necessary to cook at the bottom without touching the other side of each loin. While we cook cod, we will sprinkle with some salt above, only with fresh cod (desalted cod will always have waste). When the loins are golden under, we'll remove them from the cooking.

In the same oil, we'll have a quick frying with our peppers. We will cook them for about five minutes, we will scattering them slightly, we will add the teaspoon of sweet pepenton and finally the fried tomato. Then we'll mix well all the ingredients we have in our case.
Regresa los lomos de bacalao a la olla, igual que el sofrito de cebolla y ajo. Tapa y deja que los ingredientes se cocinen juntos por diez minutos.
After this time, cover, try the sauce and if necessary, fix with more salt and / or pepper. It mixes very delicately, so as to avoid maltreatment of fish.
The cod can be served to the Riojana at once, or preserved and reheated to serve them the following day.

tray-meatballs-with-asparagus-lezzet.name: Tray Meatballs With Asparagus
instructions: 1. Take chicken chest meats from the kitchen robot and become a mink and take it to a large bowl.
2. Add and mix fresh onions, parsleys and red peppers that you are thin.
3. Add olive oil and taste salt and spices.
4. Oil paper cool on the oven tray.
5. Spread the chopped mortar tray.
6. On the sequence index birds.
7. Bake about 20-25 minutes until pre-heated 180 degree bake with mined mortar in the oven.
8. Serve hot by slice from the oven.
9. For those who are looking for different flavor, you can find the recipe of mashed tray meatballs offered here.

trembling-pastry-with-bechamel-argiro.name: Trembling Pastry With Béchamel

ingredients.item: 800 grits of beef once in the milling machine
800 grits of beef once in the milling machine

instructions: Heat a plasotte, shallow and broad, pot over medium to strong heat.
Add the olive oil to burn and add the minced meat.
Sauté the minced meat , spreading it with a seed to cover the whole surface of the pot and do not mix continuously.
Allow the minced meat to bake, so that it does not lose its fluids with the continuous stirring.
After 3-4′ we turn the minced meat to brown on the other side.
After getting pink color everywhere, then with the spoon we break the minced meat into pieces.
This process of minced meat takes about 8 minutes.
Add the chopped onion to the fined meat as well as the garage and sauce for 2-3 minutes, until the onion becomes clear.
Add the chopped carrot and sauce for 1 to 2′.
Add the cognac and allow for 1-2′ minutes to Evaporate the alcohol.
Add the tomato, sugar, bay leaf and cinnamon wood.
Salt and pepper at will and mix the minced sauce.
Allow cinnamon to perfume the minced meat for 5 minutes and remove it.

Cover the minced meat sauce for the pastice, lower the heat and simmer for 20 minutes (without adding liquids) until it drinks its liquids completely and concentrates the flavors. Low heat in cooking minced meat is necessary
Until the minced meat is cooked in salted water.

trini-callaloo.name: Trini Callaloo

ingredients.item: Steamed rice or baked macaroni pie

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened and translucent, about 1 minute. Add scallions, cilantro, and thyme and cook, stirring, 1 minute.

Stir in collard greens and spinach just to wilt slightly, then add okra, chopped chile, squash, coconut milk, and 1 tsp. pepper; season with salt. Stir well, then place whole chile on top. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover pot, and simmer until squash is tender and greens are wilted and softened, 40–45 minutes.

Remove and discard whole chile (it should be shriveled but still intact). Using an immersion blender, purée Callaloo until smooth. (If you don’t have an immersion blender, blend in batches in a regular blender). The Callaloo should be thick and viscous. Taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Serve with rice or baked macaroni pie.

tuna-tamales-recipe-step-by-step-comeder.name: Tuna Tamales Recipe Step By Step
tuna-tamales-recipe-step-by-step-comeder.original_name: Receta de tamales de atún paso a paso

ingredients.item: Sheets of dried maize (soaked in hot water until soft)

instructions: In a big bowl, beat the vegetable butter till it's soft and fluffy.
It adds little by little nixtamalised maize flour, fish stock, baking powder and salt. Mix well to get a smooth and smooth mass. If the dough's too dry, add more bald little by little.
In a frying pan, heat up some oil and pour onion and garlic and jalapeno (if you use them) till they are golden.
Agrega los tomates y cocina hasta que se suavicen.
Add tuna, olives and capers. Cooking for a few more minutes and sauona with salt and pepper to taste.
Take a leaf of corn and put a portion of dough at the centre. Expand the mass into a thin cape.
Put a tablespoon of tuna filled at the centre of the dough.
Fold the sides of the corn leaf to the centre and then turn the bottom up, and form a package. Resuscitate with a tipple of corn if necessary.
Repite el proceso con el resto de los ingredientes.
Coloca los tamales en una vaporera, con la abertura hacia arriba.
It steamed for about 1 hour, or until the dough takes off from maize leaves.

turkey-cutlet-sandwiches-with-smoked-pap.name: Turkey Cutlet Sandwiches With Smoked Paprika Mayo And Roasted Bell Peppers

ingredients.item: -ounce jars tricolor roasted bell pepper strips

instructions: Mix mayonnaise and paprika in small bowl.
Place cutlets on work surface. Using meat mallet, pound to 1/4-inch thickness. Spread 2 tablespoons paprika mayo over both sides of cutlets. Sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Heat heavy large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add turkey cutlets to skillet and cook cutlets until browned and just cooked through, about 3 minutes per side.
Spread mayo over cut side of toasted bread halves. Top each bottom half with cutlets, then 1/4 of peppers. Cover with top halves.

turkey-stuffed-with-chicken-liver-a-rich.name: Turkey Stuffed With Chicken Liver: A Rich And Juicy Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-chicken-liver-a-rich.original_name: Pavo relleno de hígado de pollo: una receta rica y jugosa

ingredients.item: Aceite de oliva ((para frotar la piel))
250 g chicken liver (clear and cut into small cubes)
1 taza de pan rallado o miga de pan
Sal, pimienta, tomillo y romero (al gusto)

instructions: It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3).
Wash the turkey well and dry with paper towels. He rubbed the whole surface of his turkey with olive oil, and then sewed with salt and pepper.
Seal the skin from the turkey's chest carefully and place butter in this area to help keep the meat juicy.
In a frying pan, heat up some olive oil and pour the onion till golden.
Add garlic and cook another minute.
Add chicken liver cubes and cook them till they are golden, without overcooking them to maintain their tender texture.
It incorporates apple, padded bread, white wine, herbs (thyme, rosemary, parsley), salt and pepper to taste. Cooking for a few minutes till the ingredients are well integrated.
Agrega el huevo ligeramente batido y las pasas, si se usan, mezclando bien para que el relleno adquiera una consistencia compacta.
Fill the turkey with the chicken liver mixture and make sure you do not overload it to allow air to circulate and turkey to be cooked evenly.
Cierra la cavidad del pavo con hilo de cocina o palillos de madera.
Put the turkey on a baking plate and cover with an aluminum paper.
Bake the turkey for about 3-4 hours (depending on weight) and remove the paper for the last 45 minutes so that the skin will be golden.
Deja reposar el pavo unos 20 minutos antes de servir, para que los jugos se redistribuyan.

turkish-spiced-chicken-kebabs-with-pomeg.name: Turkish-spiced Chicken Kebabs With Pomegranate Relish And Tahini Yogurt

ingredients.prep: each halved lengthwise, then cut crosswise into 3 pieces

instructions: Combine lemon juice, Baharat Seasoning , and garlic in medium bowl; stir to blend. Let stand 5 minutes. Whisk in yogurt and tahini. Season tahini yogurt to taste with salt. DO AHEAD Can be made up to 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Mix all ingredients in medium bowl. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Whisk first 4 ingredients in large bowl. Add chicken. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Marinate at room temperature at least 1 hour and up to 2 hours.

Preheat broiler. Thread 6 chicken pieces onto each skewer. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Place on small rimmed baking sheet. Broil chicken until cooked through, 5 to 6 minutes per side. Arrange kebabs on platter. Serve with tahini yogurt, pomegranate relish, and warm pita breads.

tyropita-greek-cheese-pie.name: Tyropita (greek Cheese Pie)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease two 9-inch round cake pans.
Mix feta cheese and eggs together in a bowl for the filling.

Lay one sheet of phyllo on a work surface and brush liberally with olive oil. Top with another sheet and brush again with oil. Repeat for a total of four sheets, but do not brush the top of the fourth sheet. Transfer the stack of oiled sheets to one of the prepared cake pans. Drape over the bottom of the pan, trying not to be too perfect about it; you want some folds and wrinkles in the phyllo.

Spread 1/2 of the filling over the phyllo in an even layer. Fold the overhanging phyllo over the filling, again letting natural folds and wrinkles occur. Loosely lay one sheet of phyllo over the top, brush with oil, and use the oiled brush to pat down the sides all around the circumference of the cake pan.
Repeat Steps 3 and 4 with remaining phyllo, oil, and filling to assemble the second pie.
Bake both pies in the preheated oven until the tops are a deep golden brown, 45 to 55 minutes. Let cool slightly before slicing. Serve warm or at room temperature.
